chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.A.No.150 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.368/24 05.05.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Durrani, advocate for respondent. Mr. R.D.Kalhoro, Assistant Attorney General. ------ In the morning, when this matter was taken up some counsel appeared and held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the appellant with a request to keep aside this matter, as the learned counsel was busy in some other Court. In the second call, no one has appeared and no intimation is received. On the last date of hearing also learned counsel for the appellant was absent. In the circumstances, the first appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
